title: Thyroid hormone levels of pregnant inuit women and their infants exposed to environmental contaminants.
ehr_evidence: No mention of EHR; study involves direct participation and biological matrices (blood, plasma, placenta, or breast milk).
summary: Study investigating thyroid hormone levels in pregnant Inuit women and their infants exposed to environmental contaminants such as PCBs, HCB, and CPCs.
population: Pregnant Inuit women and their infants (Nunavik residents)
